title: rhacodiscus lucidus
intro: Rhacodiscus lucidus, also known as the Chinese gallplant or Fructus, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is traditionally used in Chinese medicine. The medicinal properties of Rhacodiscus lucidus are attributed to its ability to lower cholesterol and blood pressure, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. This plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including cardiovascular disease, hypertension, and diabetes, due to its health benefits of improving lipid profiles and enhancing cardiovascular function. Herbal preparations of Rhacodiscus lucidus include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
